purpose: Evaluate whether SNRI scientific extraction may begin.

gate_checks.name: SNRI profile shells exist
gate_checks.evidence: A04-005 created five empty SNRI profile shells.

gate_checks.name: Definitive source anchors exist
gate_checks.evidence: A04-006 intentionally created planned slots only; definitive anchors and source section selections do not exist yet.

gate_checks.name: Drug-specific source section selection exists
gate_checks.evidence: No drug-specific source sections have been selected for mechanism, PK, PD, safety or evidence extraction.

gate_checks.name: Extraction protocol package exists for SNRIs
gate_checks.evidence: No SNRI-specific extraction protocol package has been created after the field traceability matrix.

gate_checks.name: Runtime remains disabled
gate_checks.evidence: All A04 artifacts remain not runtime eligible.

gate_decision.blocking_reason: Definitive source anchors, drug-specific source sections and SNRI extraction protocol package are missing.
gate_decision.required_next_action: Create a pre-extraction anchor finalization mission before A04-009.

recommended_inserted_mission.purpose: Create definitive drug-specific source anchors and section-selection placeholders required before extraction.
allowed_scope: map anchor IDs to source IDs
